message:
test(unit): expand error_codes.rs inline tests (28→64) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

+36 new tests covering: ErrorCategory trait coverage (Copy/Clone, Debug,
Hash distinctness, Eq/Ne), from_code gap coverage (8000-8999 gap, all
categories at start/end boundaries), serde edge cases (all 8 variants
snake_case serialization, deserialize from string, unknown variant fails),
RecoveryStep trait coverage (Clone, Debug, text-only serde roundtrip),
ErrorCodeDef (Clone, Debug), format_plain detail tests (with/without
doc_link, numbered steps, $ command prefix), catalog integrity (all
codes FT- prefix, minimum catalog size, per-category counts for wezterm/
storage/policy/workflow/internal), specific error code spot-checks
(FT-1001/2001/4001/9001 field validation), get_error_code edge cases
(empty string, wrong prefix, unregistered code), list_codes_by_category
(all results match, sum equals total), range coverage (all 8 categories,
each spans 1000).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
